global.description: The ad features a modern design with a clear focus on a product and a promotional message.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale for LuxShelf products.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a clean and modern look.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A stylized representation of a product with two glass doors and circular knobs, set against the background.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Flash sale live Only this weekend' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The 'LuxShelf' logo appears in the top left corner, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Shop now' located at the bottom of the ad.
